SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
